user.title: Danelfin
user.description: Install the Danelfin integration. After installation, click Add entry for each ticker you want to track.

add_ticker.title: Add ticker
add_ticker.description: Enter the ticker symbol and select the market type. Examples: NVDA (US Stock), SAN.MC (European Stock), BUG (ETF).

abort.already_configured: This ticker is already being tracked.

error.ticker_empty: Please enter a ticker symbol (e.g. NVDA, SAN.MC, BUG).
error.ticker_invalid: Invalid ticker symbol. Use letters, digits and dots, e.g. NVDA, SAN.MC, BRK.B (max 12 characters).
